subject: [PATCH v3 4/4] mm: align file-backed mmap to exec folio order in thp_get_unmapped_area

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch series addresses an issue where shared libraries loaded via mmap() on arm64 architectures receive 64K-aligned virtual addresses, preventing contpte mapping even when large folios are allocated with properly aligned file offsets and physical addresses. The solution involves adding a fallback in thp_get_unmapped_area_vmflags() that uses exec_folio_order() to determine alignment, matching the readahead allocation strategy.
